---
name: "[Process Doc Update]: Add personas and roles to improve clarity & accountability"
about: "Add new personas and role descriptions to the OctoAcme Personas doc to reduce ambiguity and improve handoffs."
labels: [documentation, process improvement]

---

### Why this change
The existing personas doc defines core roles (Developers, PMs, Project Managers) but omits complementary personas such as Technical Lead, Delivery Lead, UX Researcher, Support/SRE Lead, and Security Reviewer. These roles are often implicit; making them explicit reduces ambiguity in responsibilities, improves decision speed, clarifies escalation paths, and helps onboard new team members.

### What changed
- Added new persona sections to docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md:
  - Technical Lead
  - Delivery Lead
  - UX Researcher
  - Support Lead / Site Reliability (Ops) Lead
  - Security Reviewer
- Each section includes: role summary, responsibilities, goals, typical communication, and interactions with existing roles.

### Linked issue
Closes/addresses: #4
